case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. KAREN C GASCON ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100096317) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-07-2020 CONTINUED TO APR-07-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
